title: Deltarune Explosions
description: Explosions now sound like explosions from Deltarune.
body:
**This is a soundpack that replaces those boring vanilla explosions with explosions from deltarune!**

_Please Note: I didn't replace the particles, you can remove the explosion particles with my other resource pack: [PVP Friendly End Crystals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-friendly-end-crystals)._
**Fun Fact: you can also adjust the sound's volume in the "sounds" JSON file; located in** 
_Deltarune Explosions.zip/assets/minecraft_**.**
